### Smiley

Free desktop app — **Windows, macOS, Linux**. Animated anime GIF status on Discord. No Developer Portal setup.

```
Download → open Discord → pick activity → done.
```

Also: [Smiley.Native](https://github.com/1tsRajuWu/Smiley/blob/main/README-NATIVE.md) — lightweight build, no Electron.
